name: MoveIt Planner
description: Create a MoveItPlanner from a connected RosClient. The robot cell is read from `ros_client.robot_cell` (set by a Load Robot Cell From ROS component) and uploaded to the planning scene, so planning calls don't re-upload geometry.

inputParameters.name: ros_client
inputParameters.description: Connected RosClient. Wire the `ros_client` output of a Load Robot Cell From ROS component so the loaded cell (with any registered tools / rigid bodies) is read from `ros_client.robot_cell`.
